scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/shared/dist packages/wechat-sdk/dist packages/bridge/dist packages/deepforge/dist packages/manager/dist && rm -f packages/shared/*.tsbuildinfo packages/wechat-sdk/*.tsbuildinfo packages/bridge/*.tsbuildinfo packages/deepforge/*.tsbuildinfo
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:wechat-sdk && pnpm run build:bridge && pnpm run build:deepforge && pnpm run build:manager
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
